payload.title: Shareable multi-tenant collaboration: projects, members, invites, isolation
payload.description: Today the hosted hub authenticates per-user but serves ONE shared board: tenancy claims are minted but ignored by workspace resolution, there is no access control beyond can-you-sign-in, and the per-user projects created at login are orphan rows disconnected from any served board. This epic turns the existing, tested primitives (membership.js roles owner/member/viewer, authz.js, the projects/memberships tables, SCP-124 storage spike) into a real collaborative product: each project IS its own board, the active board is derived from the authenticated session, members are invited with roles, and data is isolated per tenant. Builds on SCP-167 (auth wiring), SCP-171 (claims tenancy), SCP-124 (multi-tenant storage), SCP-131 (membership).
